plans.goal: Eval page and PyPI probe agree — no false install promise
plans.done_when: probe_sourcea_boot_pypi_v1.py ok OR eval copy says GitHub clone pending
plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/probe_sourcea_boot_pypi_v1.py --json && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/eval --marker sourcea-boot && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
plans.client_demo: Open /eval — show install line matches live PyPI or honest GitHub fallback
plans.cloud_action: Client proof recipe: Fix public install/package claim vs PyPI reality · DONE when probe_sourcea_boot_pypi_v1.py ok OR eval copy says GitHub clone pending · demo: Open /eval — show install line matches live PyPI or honest GitHub fallback

plans.goal: Terminal shows online send path OR clear offline + forge@sourcea.app fallback
plans.done_when: Terminal page markers present; health/send path returns ok or offline banner
plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/sourcea/forge/terminal && --marker "Forge Terminal" && --marker "data-sa-proof-cta" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
plans.client_demo: Send one prompt on terminal — response or explicit offline state
plans.cloud_action: Client proof recipe: Forge Terminal: fix Connecting… or show honest offline state · DONE when Terminal page markers present; health/send path returns ok or offline banner · demo: Send one prompt on terminal — response or explicit offline state
